visual_description: A group of people in dark, period-style clothing runs across a wooden bridge at night, illuminated by a bright light on the left side of the bridge. The camera follows them as they sprint, with some individuals being pursued and others appearing to be grabbed or restrained. The scene is dimly lit, showing the metal truss structure of the bridge and the motion blur of the runners.
audio_description: The audio includes rapid footsteps, heavy breathing, and faint, urgent shouts that suggest a chase.
